meta.title: Daggerheart Beastforms (Druid)
meta.license: DPCGL. SRD content (c) Critical Role, LLC.
meta.effectModel: Each Beastform maps to the effect-model `stateForm` primitive: modifiers (trait +traitBonus, Evasion +evasionBonus, thresholds +thresholdMod), an attack profile (Proficiency d{damageDie}+damageBonus, range attackRange, using `trait`), advantage list, and granted features. Activation cost = mark a Stress (or Druid Hope feature 'Evolution' = 3 Hope, raise one trait +1). endWhen: drop at will or on marking last HP. 'Fragile' Tier-1 forms also end on Major+ damage.
notes: Damage uses your Proficiency: roll (Proficiency) x d{damageDie} + damageBonus.
Legendary Beast / Mythic Beast are 'upgrade an existing form' templates (no own attack profile).
Legendary/Mythic Hybrid let you combine lower-tier forms' advantages + features.

features.name: Agile
features.text: Your movement is silent, and you can spend a Hope to move up to Far range without rolling.

features.name: Fragile
features.text: When you take Major or greater damage, you drop out of Beastform.

features.name: Aquatic
features.text: You can breathe and move naturally underwater.

features.name: Fragile
features.text: When you take Major or greater damage, you drop out of Beastform.

features.name: Companion
features.text: When you Help an Ally, you can roll a d8 as your advantage die.

features.name: Fragile
features.text: When you take Major or greater damage, you drop out of Beastform.

features.name: Carrier
features.text: You can carry up to two willing allies with you when you move.

features.name: Trample
features.text: Mark a Stress to move up to Close range in a straight line and make an attack against all targets within Melee range of the line. Targets you succeed against take d8+1 physical damage using your Proficiency and are temporarily Vulnerable.

features.name: Elusive Prey
features.text: When an attack roll against you would succeed, you can mark a Stress and roll a d4. Add the result to your Evasion against this attack.

features.name: Fragile
features.text: When you take Major or greater damage, you drop out of Beastform.

features.name: Hobbling Strike
features.text: When you succeed on an attack against a target within Melee range, you can mark a Stress to make the target temporarily Vulnerable.

features.name: Pack Hunting
features.text: When you succeed on an attack against the same target as an ally who acts immediately before you, add a d8 to your damage roll.

features.name: Venomous Bite
features.text: When you succeed on an attack against a target within Melee range, the target becomes temporarily Poisoned. A Poisoned creature takes 1d10 direct physical damage each time they act.

features.name: Webslinger
features.text: You can create a strong web material useful for both adventuring and battle. The web is resilient enough to support one creature. You can temporarily Restrain a target within Close range by succeeding on a Finesse Roll against them.

features.name: Armored Shell
features.text: Your hardened exterior gives you resistance to physical damage. Additionally, mark an Armor slot to retract into your shell. While in your shell, physical damage is reduced by a number equal to your Armor Score (after applying resistance), but you can't perform other actions without leaving this form.

features.name: Cannonball
features.text: Mark a Stress to allow an ally to throw or launch you at an adversary. To do so, the ally makes an attack roll using Agility or Strength (their choice) against a target within Close Range. On a success, the adversary takes d12+2 physical damage using the thrower's Proficiency. You can spend a Hope to target an additional adversary within Very Close range of the first. The second target takes half the damage dealt to the first target.

features.name: Fleet
features.text: Spend a Hope to move up to Far range without rolling.

features.name: Takedown
features.text: Mark a Stress to move into Melee range of a target and make an attack roll against them. On a success, you gain a +2 bonus to your Proficiency for this attack and the target must mark a Stress.

features.name: Rampage
features.text: When you roll a 1 on a damage die, you can roll a d10 and add the result to the damage roll. Additionally, before you make an attack roll, you can mark a Stress to gain a +1 bonus to your Proficiency for that attack.

features.name: Thick Hide
features.text: You gain a +2 bonus to your damage thresholds.

features.name: Venomous Strike
features.text: Make an attack against any number of targets within Very Close range. On a success, a target is temporarily Poisoned. A Poisoned creature takes 1d10 direct physical damage each time they act.

features.name: Warning Hiss
features.text: Mark a Stress to force any number of targets within Melee range to move back to Very Close range.

features.name: Bird's-Eye View
features.text: You can fly at will. Once per rest while you are airborne, you can ask the GM a question about the scene below you without needing to roll. The first time a character makes a roll to act on this information, they gain advantage on the roll.

features.name: Hollow Bones
features.text: You gain a -2 penalty to your damage thresholds.

features.name: Aquatic
features.text: You can breathe and move naturally underwater.

features.name: Vicious Maul
features.text: When you succeed on an attack against a target, you can spend a Hope to make them Vulnerable and gain a +1 bonus to your Proficiency for this attack.

beastforms.name: Great Predator
beastforms.examples: Dire Wolf, Velociraptor, Sabertooth Tiger, etc.

features.name: Carrier
features.text: You can carry up to two willing allies with you when you move.

features.name: Vicious Maul
features.text: When you succeed on an attack against a target, you can spend a Hope to make them temporarily Vulnerable and gain a +1 bonus to your Proficiency for this attack.

features.name: Bird's-Eye View
features.text: You can fly at will. Once per rest while you are airborne, you can ask the GM a question about the scene below you without needing to roll. The first time a character makes a roll to act on this information, they gain advantage on the roll.

features.name: Carrier
features.text: You can carry up to two willing allies with you when you move.

features.name: Evolved
features.text: Pick a Tier 1 Beastform option and become a larger, more powerful version of that creature. While you're in this form, you retain all traits and features from the original form and gain the following bonuses: A +6 bonus to damage rolls; A +1 bonus to the trait used by this form; A +2 bonus to Evasion.

features.name: Hybrid Features
features.text: To transform into this creature, mark an additional Stress. Choose any two Beastform options from Tiers 1–2. Choose a total of four advantages and two features from those options.

features.name: Physical Defense
features.text: You gain a +3 bonus to your damage thresholds.

features.name: Snapping Strike
features.text: When you succeed on an attack against a target within Melee range, you can spend a Hope to clamp that opponent in your jaws, making them temporarily Restrained and Vulnerable.

features.name: Ocean Master
features.text: You can breathe and move naturally underwater. When you succeed on an attack against a target within Melee range, you can temporarily Restrain them.

features.name: Unyielding
features.text: When you would mark an Armor Slot, roll a d6. On a result of 5 or higher, reduce the severity by one threshold without marking an Armor Slot.

features.name: Carrier
features.text: You can carry up to four willing allies with you when you move.

features.name: Demolish
features.text: Spend a Hope to move up to Far range in a straight line and make an attack against all targets within Melee range of the line. Targets you succeed against take d8+10 physical damage using your Proficiency and are temporarily Vulnerable.

features.name: Undaunted
features.text: You gain a +2 bonus to all your damage thresholds.

features.name: Carrier
features.text: You can carry up to three willing allies with you when you move.

features.name: Deadly Raptor
features.text: You can fly at will and move up to Far range as part of your action. When you move in a straight line into Melee range of a target from at least Close range and make an attack against that target in the same action, you can reroll all damage dice that rolled a result lower than your Proficiency.

features.name: Evolved
features.text: Pick a Tier 1 or Tier 2 Beastform option and become a larger, more powerful version of that creature. While you're in this form, you retain all traits and features from the original form and gain the following bonuses: A +9 bonus to damage rolls; A +2 bonus to the trait used by this form; A +3 bonus to Evasion; Your damage die increases by one size (d6 becomes d8, d8 becomes d10, etc.).

features.name: Hybrid Features
features.text: To transform into this creature, mark 2 additional Stress. Choose any three Beastform options from Tiers 1-3. Choose a total of five advantages and three features from those options.

features.name: Devastating Strikes
features.text: When you deal Severe damage to a target within Melee range, you can mark a Stress to force them to mark an additional Hit Point.

features.name: Massive Stride
features.text: You can move up to Far range without rolling. You ignore rough terrain (at the GM's discretion) due to your size.
